title: Strategic Spatial Energy Plan (SSEP): timeline extension
body: "This letter provides an update on the Strategic Spatial Energy Plan (SSEP) being developed by NESO. It explains why updated cost and demand data are being incorporated into the modelling process to ensure accuracy and transparency.  As a result, the timeline for completing the SSEP will be extended. The purpose of this update is to maintain the quality and credibility of the plan while aligning with the latest available information.  "
